transcript.clean_text: stage two of bahrain east was live on gcn plus make sure to subscribe to watch every stage live or on demand the second stage took the riders south from ufalcis all the way to orleans battling against the wind for the left-hand side for most of the day echelons as the race was split by jumbo visma and quick step alpha vinyl three more glitches once again in the front group with the likes of naido quintana and adam yates few riders distance some big names losing a lot of time the likes of mcnulty and almeida alongside defending champion shachmann were called out some of the big sprinters were in the front group there was a fracture in that front group but that group would eventually come back together hague and simon yates very grateful for being back in and amongst the action behind though two minutes five seconds to other riders and growing at the intermediate sprint three bonus seconds for the leader christophe laporte two more bonus seconds for watford art and one for zenyik stieber laporte on his way to keeping the yellow jersey but who would win the stage in the final 20 kilometers it looked as though the second group was about to get back matteo jorgensen and ivan garcia cortina those standing to gain the most they get to within just over 20 seconds but wouldn't make it back in as the race yet again split up as they turned into more wins all of the big names were staying attentive naido quintana in the front adam yates the likes of danny martinez as well in there ben o'connor made the group simon yates was in there but primoz roglick's the one alongside alexander vlasov to look out for in the gc stakes matthew holmes would keep the polkadot jersey he'd be dropped from the main group but thinking about breakaways to come and we're just under eight kilometers to go the front group yet again accelerated they were chasing after stefan bisega who went on the attack looking for a stage win took the main group a while to get all organized and ready the quick step alpha vinyl put things together well evelompard with an absolutely monstrous turn on the front all the way to the flam rouge bissiga was swept up inside the final kilometer there was plenty of power left for the lead up first it was steep art then it was cena jakobson at the back of the train lapot would be there in the yellow jersey to try and help out what for night sam bennett called out a little further back laporte's move here looked to put quickstep off of their train but they weren't disturbed enough because the power that came from fabio jacobson's sprint was absolutely incredible zooming fast wild fanart taking the victory his first ever in bahris jumbo visma though did keep the yellow jersey lapot in the lead with watfornat finishing second the fabio jacobson thanking yve lompat for bringing back that late attack and setting up the victory jakobson fanat la porte in the top 10. a second successive day for christopher laporte in the yellow jersey what bernard at five seconds roglic in third eleven alato the closest of the rest at 36 seconds another day heading south for stage three 190 kilometers the longest stage so far the more difficult finale those sprinters who can climb will be those who have the most to gain at the end you
